data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the context of a DDoS attack scenario. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or results related to rate limiting effectiveness, nor does it confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence or traces to support the validation of this scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting effectiveness tests or results.
